content.text:
Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/YatCC/test/task0/CMakeLists.txt:
     1	file(REAL_PATH ../cases _cases_dir)
     2	file(REAL_PATH ../rtlib _rtlib_dir)
     3	
     4	# 生成官方测例表
     5	set(TASK0_CASES_TXT ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/cases.txt)
     6	string(REPLACE ";" "\n" _lines "${TEST_CASES}")
     7	file(WRITE ${TASK0_CASES_TXT} "${_lines}")
     8	
     9	# 生成官方测例答案（预处理的结果）
    10	add_custom_target(
    11	  task0-answer
    12	  ${Python3_EXECUTABLE}
    13	  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/answer.py
    14	  ${TEST_CASES_DIR} # 测例目录
    15	  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR} # 输出目录
    16	  ${TASK0_CASES_TXT} # 测例表
    17	  ${CLANG_EXECUTABLE} # clang 路径
    18	  ${_rtlib_dir} # rtlib 路径
    19	  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
    20	  USES_TERMINAL
    21	  SOURCES answer.py)
    22	
    23	# 对实验进行评分
    24	add_custom_target(
    25	  task0-score
    26	  ${Python3_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/score.py
    27	  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR} $<TARGET_FILE:task0>
    28	  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
    29	  USES_TERMINAL
    30	  SOURCES score.py)
    31	
    32	add_dependencies(task0-score task0)
    33	
    34	# ############################################################################ #
    35	# 提供 diy 功能，对单独的cases目录进行重新编译与评分，跳过缓存机制。
    36	# ############################################################################ #
    37	
    38	# 生成实验零的 diy-cases 答案
    39	add_custom_target(
    40	  task0-diy-answer
    41	  COMMAND
    42	    ${Python3_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/answer.py
    43	    ${DIY_TEST_CASES_DIR} # 测例目录
    44	    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/diy-cases # 输出目录
    45	    ${DIY_TEST_CASES_TXT} # 测例表
    46	    ${CLANG_EXECUTABLE} ${_rtlib_dir} --no-cache # 禁用缓存机制
    47	  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
    48	  USES_TERMINAL
    49	  SOURCES answer.py)
    50
